venues.descriptionZh: 2026年世界杯决赛举办场地，位于纽约大都会区，是美国最大的NFL体育场之一。该场馆曾举办第48届超级碗，也是纽约巨人队和纽约喷气机队的主场，凭借其卓越的设施和便捷的交通成为世界级赛事的首选之地。
venues.descriptionEn: The flagship venue for the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final, MetLife Stadium is one of the largest and most technologically advanced NFL stadiums in the United States. Located in the New York metropolitan area, it has hosted Super Bowl XLVIII and serves as the home of both the New York Giants and New York Jets.

venues.descriptionZh: 达拉斯牛仔队的主场，以其巨大的可伸缩屋顶和悬挂在球场上方的超大高清屏幕闻名。这座标志性圆顶体育场拥有世界一流的设施，是举办大型体育赛事和演唱会的热门场地。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the Dallas Cowboys, AT&T Stadium is renowned for its massive retractable roof and the world's largest 4K video board suspended over the field. This iconic domed venue offers state-of-the-art facilities and has established itself as a premier destination for major sporting events and entertainment.

venues.descriptionZh: 2026世界杯最新建成的一座场馆，位于洛杉矶，以其前沿科技设计和通透的露天屋顶著称。它是NFL首座室内外结合的体育场，也是洛杉矶公羊队和闪电队的主场，曾成功举办第56届超级碗。
venues.descriptionEn: The newest venue of the 2026 World Cup, SoFi Stadium is a tech-forward marvel located in Los Angeles with its distinctive translucent roof and open-air design. As the first indoor-outdoor NFL stadium, it is home to the Los Angeles Rams and Chargers and successfully hosted Super Bowl LVI.

venues.descriptionZh: 位于佛罗里达州迈阿密，是迈阿密海豚队的主场。该场馆经过多次现代化改造，拥有先进的遮阳篷设计，曾举办多届超级碗和大学橄榄球季后赛半决赛，是南佛罗里达州最重要的体育地标。
venues.descriptionEn: Located in Miami Gardens, Florida, Hard Rock Stadium is home to the Miami Dolphins and has undergone extensive modernization, including a canopy redesign. It has hosted multiple Super Bowls and College Football Playoff semifinals, standing as the premier sports landmark of South Florida.

venues.descriptionZh: 亚特兰大猎鹰队的主场，以其标志性的花瓣形可伸缩屋顶和LEED白金级环保认证闻名。该场馆曾举办第53届超级碗，是2019年NFL赛季最高上座率的主场，也是美国职业足球大联盟亚特兰大联队的主场。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the Atlanta Falcons, Mercedes-Benz Stadium is celebrated for its iconic petal-shaped retractable roof and LEED Platinum certification. It hosted Super Bowl LIII and set MLS attendance records as the home of Atlanta United FC, making it a true multi-sport venue.

venues.descriptionZh: 西雅图海鹰队和西雅图海湾人队共用的主场，以其震耳欲聋的观众声浪闻名，曾创下NFL最高噪音记录。球场位于西雅图市中心，拥有壮丽的城市天际线景观，是美国职业足球氛围最为浓厚的场地之一。
venues.descriptionEn: Shared home of the Seattle Seahawks and Seattle Sounders FC, Lumen Field is famous for its deafening crowd noise, having set records for the loudest stadium in the NFL. Situated in downtown Seattle with stunning skyline views, it boasts one of the most passionate soccer atmospheres in the United States.

venues.descriptionZh: 新英格兰爱国者队的主场，位于波士顿郊外的福克斯堡。该场馆以球迷体验著称，拥有独特的灯塔和海盗船标志性设计，也是新英格兰革命队的大本营，多年来承办过多场国际足球赛事。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the New England Patriots in Foxborough, just outside Boston, Gillette Stadium is celebrated for its fan experience and distinctive lighthouse monument. Also the base of the New England Revolution, it has a long history of hosting major international soccer matches.

venues.descriptionZh: 费城老鹰队的主场，坐落于费城体育建筑群中心。该场馆拥有出色的天然草坪系统和现代化设施，曾举办多场国际足球友谊赛和美洲杯比赛，是2017年NFL选秀大会的举办地。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the Philadelphia Eagles, Lincoln Financial Field sits at the heart of the South Philadelphia Sports Complex. Equipped with an excellent natural grass system and modern amenities, it has hosted numerous international friendlies and Copa America matches over the years.

venues.descriptionZh: 休斯敦德州人队的主场，是美国首座拥有可伸缩屋顶的NFL球场。该场馆多次举办超级碗和NCAA最终四强赛，在大型赛事运营方面拥有丰富经验，是德克萨斯州最重要的多功能体育场馆。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the Houston Texans, NRG Stadium was the first NFL stadium to feature a retractable roof. With extensive experience hosting multiple Super Bowls and NCAA Final Four tournaments, it is one of the most proven large-scale event venues in Texas.

venues.descriptionZh: 堪萨斯城酋长队的主场，是美国最具传奇色彩的NFL球场之一。该场馆以狂热的球迷文化和令人窒息的主场氛围闻名，2014年创下室外体育场最高噪音世界纪录，是体育界最具标志性的比赛日体验之一。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the Kansas City Chiefs, Arrowhead Stadium is one of the most legendary venues in the NFL. Known for its fervent fan culture and intimidating atmosphere, it set the Guinness World Record for loudest outdoor stadium in 2014, delivering one of the most iconic game-day experiences in sports.

venues.descriptionZh: 旧金山49人队的主场，位于硅谷核心地带的圣克拉拉。该场馆融合了绿色建筑技术和前沿智能设施，是NFL首座获得LEED金级认证的体育场，曾举办第50届超级碗这一里程碑赛事。
venues.descriptionEn: Home of the San Francisco 49ers in the heart of Silicon Valley, Levi's Stadium integrates green building technology with cutting-edge smart features. It was the first NFL stadium to earn LEED Gold certification and hosted the milestone Super Bowl 50.

venues.descriptionZh: 加拿大最大的足球专用球场，是多伦多FC和加拿大国家橄榄球队共用的主场。该场馆为世界杯进行了大规模扩建，是加拿大足球运动发展的标志性建筑，曾举办2016年MLS杯决赛和多场国际赛事。
venues.descriptionEn: Canada's largest soccer-specific stadium, BMO Field is home to Toronto FC and the Toronto Argonauts. Extensively expanded for the World Cup, it stands as a landmark of Canadian soccer development and has hosted the MLS Cup Final and numerous international fixtures.

venues.descriptionZh: 位于温哥华市中心，是加拿大西海岸最大的多功能体育场馆。该场馆在2011年完成了可伸缩屋顶的升级改造，曾举办2015年女足世界杯决赛，是加拿大举办国际足球赛事的重要基地。
venues.descriptionEn: Located in downtown Vancouver, BC Place is the largest multi-purpose venue on Canada's West Coast. Following a major renovation in 2011 that installed a retractable roof, it hosted the 2015 FIFA Women's World Cup Final and serves as a key hub for international soccer in Canada.

venues.descriptionZh: 世界足坛最神圣的殿堂之一，唯一一座举办过两届世界杯决赛（1970年和1986年）的体育场。这座位于墨西哥城海拔2240米处的传奇球场见证了贝利和马拉多纳的封神时刻，是墨西哥足球无可争议的精神圣殿。
venues.descriptionEn: One of the most sacred venues in world football, Estadio Azteca is the only stadium to have hosted two World Cup Finals (1970 and 1986). Perched at 2,240 meters above sea level in Mexico City, this legendary ground witnessed the crowning moments of both Pele and Diego Maradona, making it the undisputed spiritual home of Mexican football.

venues.descriptionZh: 墨西哥最现代化的足球专用球场之一，位于新莱昂州蒙特雷大都会区。该场馆以流畅的绿色外观设计和卓越的观赛视野著称，是CF蒙特雷队的主场，为世界杯进行了容量扩建。
venues.descriptionEn: One of Mexico's most modern soccer-specific stadiums, Estadio BBVA is located in the Monterrey metropolitan area of Nuevo Leon. Known for its sleek green facade design and excellent sightlines, it is home to CF Monterrey and has been expanded in capacity for the World Cup.

venues.descriptionZh: 位于墨西哥足球传统重镇瓜达拉哈拉，是瓜达拉哈拉体育俱乐部的主场。该场馆以独特的火山岩外观和周围的绿色景观设计闻名，体现了哈利斯科州的火山地貌特色，是墨西哥足球青训体系的摇篮。
venues.descriptionEn: Located in Guadalajara, the traditional heartland of Mexican football, Estadio Akron is home to Club Deportivo Guadalajara (Chivas). The stadium is notable for its distinctive volcanic stone exterior and surrounding green landscape, reflecting the volcanic terrain of Jalisco state and serving as a cradle of Mexican football development.
